leadText: If you were looking for the Berry Juice sold at the Juice Shoppe, see Juice Shoppe. Berry Juice (Japanese: きのみジュース Berry Juice) is a type of medicine introduced in Generation II. It is a drink that restores a Pokémon's HP. It can be used as a held item.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Held item [ edit | edit source ] If the holder's HP falls below 50%, it will consume its held Berry Juice and restore 20 HP. Bag item [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, it restores 20 HP to that Pokémon. It is consumed after use.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods G S C At the end of each Pokémon battle after the player has reached Goldenrod City , there is a 1 / 16 chance that the first Shuckle holding the Berry item in the party will have this item converted into a Berry Juice [ 1 ] D P Pt Trade HG SS Cianwood City (held by Shuckie ) Held by wild Shuckle (100% chance) B W Black City B (Shane), Royal Unova Tu Held by wild Shuckle (100% chance) B2 W2 Undella Town , Nuvema Town Join Avenue ( Raffle Shop ), Pokéstar Studios , Royal Unova Tu Held by wild Shuckle (100% chance) X Y Camphrier Town Lumiose City South Boulevard Pokémon Center (10 PM ) Held by wild Shuckle (100% chance) OR AS Mauville City PokéMileage Center (10 PM ) PMC * PokéMileage Shop (5 PM - fewer than 20 Medals ; 4 PM - 20 Medals or more) S M US UM Big Wave Beach , Ula'ula Beach , Heahea Beach , Poni Beach (1 BP ) US UM Festival Plaza ( Lottery shop : tenth prize) Sw Sh Battle Café Held by wild Shuckle (100% chance) Distribution [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period Sw Sh Pokémon Center Alcremie Sweets Japan November 1, 2021 to October 31, 2022 ↑ pret/pokegold: pokerus.asm lines 125-126

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description G S C Restores Pok é mon HP by 20. R S E Colo XD A 100% pure juice that restores HP by 20 points. FR LG A 100% pure juice. It restores the HP of one Pok é mon by 20 points. D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 A 100% pure juice made of Berries. It restores the HP of one Pokémon by just 20 points. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E A 100 percent pure juice made of Berries. When consumed, it restores 20 HP to an injured Pokémon. Sw Sh BD SP LA A 100 percent pure juice made of Berries. It can be used to restore 20 HP to a single Pokémon. S V A 100 percent pure juice made from Berries. It can be used to restore 20 HP to a Pokémon.
